## Tests

## Release Safety

- [ ] No real secrets, private account IDs, private documents, or generated local artifacts are included.
- [ ] Public docs are English-only.
- [ ] New fixtures are synthetic or safe to redistribute.
- [ ] New env vars, bindings, routes, secrets, or resource names are documented.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed against `SECURITY.md`.
